member.office_address: 322 Cannon House Office Building Washington DC 20515-3102

form_analysis.form_instructions_text:
Deadline: March 10th at 11:59 pm MT.

THIS IS NOT FOR COMMUNITY PROJECT FUNDING. IF YOU ARE TRYING TO APPLY FOR COMMUNITY PROJECT FUNDING, CLICK HERE.

Please complete this form to request programmatic funding, report language, or bill language for the FY2027 appropriations cycle through the Office of U.S. Representative Gabe Vasquez. If additional information is needed on your project, you will be emailed a more comprehensive form.

Please complete a new form for each individual project you are submitting for consideration. Not every request will be deemed eligible by the various Appropriations Subcommittees.

If you have questions or need further assistance, please call 202-225-2365 or email the appropriate legislative staffer.

sections.description: Information about the individual and organization submitting the request.

fields.label: If you are filling this out on behalf of a client, what firm or organization do you work for?

sections.description: Information regarding the specific appropriations request.

fields.label: Impact on New Mexico's 2nd Congressional District
fields.draft_value:
* Sustains $11.1M (FY23-FY25) in local NASA Science obligations, supporting high-tech research at New Mexico State University and New Mexico Tech.
* Advances planetary defense through a $1.4M award to New Mexico Institute of Mining and Technology in Socorro to track and characterize hazardous near-Earth objects.
* Supports local aerospace industry including Galactic Enterprises, LLC and Matheson Tri-Gas, Inc. in Las Cruces for rocket fuel and flight testing research.
* Leverages $3.7M at NMSU to lead critical data archiving for planetary missions, ensuring New Mexico remains a hub for national space science data.
fields.rationale: Cited specific cumulative award values and annual obligation totals ($11.16M) for NM-02. Referenced specific institutions (NMSU, NMT) and local businesses (Galactic Enterprises, Matheson Tri-Gas) and their specific research areas as provided in the NASA spending context.

fields.label: Type of Request
fields.rationale: The reference values explicitly state that this is a 'Programmatic' request for NASA's Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Anticipated Appropriations Subcommittee
fields.rationale: NASA funding, specifically for the Science Mission Directorate, is under the jurisdiction of the Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies Subcommittee as noted in the reference values.

fields.label: Agency
fields.rationale: This is the primary agency for the request as specified in the reference values.

fields.label: Bureau
fields.rationale: The Science Mission Directorate (SMD) is the relevant bureau/account for this NASA funding request.

fields.label: Account Name or Number
fields.rationale: 'Science' is the account name; 'Science Mission Directorate' provides the full descriptive context required for congressional forms.

fields.label: Program/Language Title
fields.rationale: Standard title for programmatic funding requests targeting NASA Science.

sections.description: Fiscal year funding levels and proposed legislative language.

fields.label: Level of Funding Requested for FY27 (if applicable)
fields.help_text: Enter the specific dollar amount requested for the current fiscal year cycle.
fields.rationale: This is the specific topline funding ask provided in the advocacy context.

fields.label: Level of Funding Enacted in FY26 (if applicable)
fields.help_text: Enter the dollar amount enacted in the previous fiscal year.
fields.rationale: Value provided in the pre-filled field and confirmed by the FY2026 enacted data in reference values.

fields.label: Level of Funding in President's FY27 Budget Request
fields.help_text: Enter the dollar amount included for this program in the President's budget.
fields.rationale: The reference values state the FY2027 President's Budget Request has not been released yet.

fields.label: Description of the Program Request or Proposed Language
fields.draft_value:
* Requesting $9 billion for NASA's Science Mission Directorate to provide a $1.75B increase over FY26 enacted levels and restore stability to the scientific workforce.
* Maintains U.S. leadership in space science against rapid expansion by China, ensuring the U.S. sets the norms for 21st-century exploration.
* Executes peer-reviewed priorities from the National Academies' Decadal Surveys, which provide a rigorous, nonpartisan roadmap for transformative discovery.
* Stimulates the domestic economy with a roughly 3-to-1 return on investment, benefiting the aerospace supply chain and STEM talent pipeline.
fields.rationale: Utilized the specific $9B funding ask and FY26 enacted figures. Incorporated strategic advocacy points regarding China competition, economic ROI, and Decadal Survey adherence.

fields.label: Member of Congress Leading the Request (if it is a multi-member request)
fields.draft_value: Reps. Don Bacon (R-NE) and Judy Chu (D-CA) are leading an existing multi-member House letter in support of this request. Request also being submitted to additional House offices.
fields.rationale: Request is being submitted to multiple offices; Bacon/Chu lead the House letter per reference values.

fields.label: Your Priority Level (if submitting multiple requests)
fields.rationale: Priority level is a user-specific determination based on their full list of submissions.

fields.label: If you have report language, please include it below.
fields.rationale: The request context specifies that no report language is being requested for this programmatic funding ask.

fields.label: If you have bill language, please include it below.
fields.rationale: The request context specifies that no bill language is being requested for this programmatic funding ask.
